name: wf-feature-addition
prompt:
Read string-helpers-buggy.rkt. Add two new exported functions:

1. `(camel->kebab s)` — converts camelCase to kebab-case. Example: "myFunctionName" → "my-function-name". Use regexp-replace* with #rx"([A-Z])" and string-downcase.

2. `(pad-center s width [char #\space])` — centers string s in a field of given width, padding with char. If s is longer than width, return s unchanged. Example: (pad-center "hi" 6) → "  hi  "

Add both functions after the existing ones, and add them to the provide form.
description: Pattern 7: Add new functionality to an existing module with provide export
